source.clause_quote: You may convey a covered work in object code form ... provided that you also convey ... the corresponding source under the terms of this License.

obligations.requirement: A non-(A)GPL project must not link copyleft (A)GPL-3.0 dependencies; doing so forces the whole work under (A)GPL.

fix.guidance: Replace the copyleft dependency with a permissively-licensed alternative, or relicense the project under (A)GPL-3.0.

source.clause_quote: You must retain, in the Source form of any Derivative Works that You distribute, all copyright, patent, trademark, and attribution notices ... and ... include a readable copy of the attribution notices contained within ... a NOTICE text file distributed as part of the Derivative Works.

obligations.requirement: Projects bundling Apache-2.0 dependencies must ship a NOTICE file listing each such dependency.

fix.guidance: Create/extend a NOTICE file listing each Apache-2.0 dependency.
